specs.title: TC-83225 — Logo click navigates to home @homepage @navigation @smoke

steps.title: Navigate to an internal page (not home)
Click page body to unblock loading after search
Click the London Drugs logo
Click page body to dismiss loading overlay if stuck
Verify home page is loaded after logo click

specs.title: TC-83226 — Search with invalid term shows 'Nothing found!' @search @negative

steps.title: Navigate to homepage
Click page body to unblock loading after search
Wait for search input to be ready
Type non-existent search term
Submit search
Click page body to unblock loading after search
Wait for no-results message'

specs.title: TC-83227 — Search returns relevant results for a valid term @search @positive @smoke

steps.title: Navigate to homepage
Click page body to unblock loading after search
Wait for search input to be ready
Click search input field
Type search term
Submit search by pressing Enter
Click page body to unblock loading after search
Verify search term appears in a product title or section heading

specs.title: TC-83228 — Store Locator opens and Find All Stores link works @store-locator @navigation

steps.title: Navigate to homepage
Click page body to unblock loading
Click 'Select Your Store' / stores link in header
Wait for Store Locator URL
Verify 'Find a Store Near You' heading is visible
Click 'Find All Stores by Province' link
Wait for All Stores URL
Verify All Stores list is visible

specs.title: TC-83229 — Mini Cart opens and View Cart navigates to cart page @mini-cart @cart @navigation

steps.title: Search for a product and navigate to the first result
Capture product name from product page
Add product to cart
Wait for View Cart & Checkout button and click it
Wait for cart page to load
Navigate to homepage
Wait for homepage React hydration before interacting
Wait for mini cart badge to show item count
Click mini cart icon in header
Verify mini cart panel opens
Click 'View Cart' button inside mini cart panel
Verify cart page opens and shows Cart heading
Verify added product is listed in the cart

steps.title: Navigate to homepage
Click page body to unblock loading
Click hamburger / mega menu button
Verify mega menu is visible
Verify the hamburger button itself is still visible

Verify "Services" link is visible and has correct href
Verify "Flyers" link is visible and has correct href

specs.title: TC-83236 — Price element is visible and formatted correctly on the first vitamins PDP @pdp @price

Verify "Our Price" label is visible
Verify price value is visible and matches $X.XX format

Verify "Availability:" section is visible on the page

specs.title: TC-83238 — Add to cart with In-Store Pickup (postal V6B 1A1) increments mini cart counter @pdp @cart @in-store-pickup

steps.title: Navigate to a vitamins product detail page via search
Read current mini cart badge count before adding to cart
Open store selector dialog and set store using postal code V6B 1A1
Search for stores using postal code V6B 1A1
Select the first store from results
Verify In-Store Pickup is now selected (fulfillment changed)
Click ADD TO CART with In-Store Pickup fulfillment
Verify mini cart badge counter incremented by 1

specs.title: TC-83239 — Add to cart with Ship to Home (postal V6B 1A1) increments cart counter @pdp @cart @ship-to-home

steps.title: Navigate to a vitamins product detail page via search
Open the delivery location modal via "Change Postal Code" link
Fill postal code V6B 1A1 and submit
Ensure Ship to Home fulfillment is selected
Click ADD TO CART with Ship to Home fulfillment
Verify cart counter incremented by 1

specs.title: TC-83233 FTC_02_01_01 -- Applying first available filter on lipstick search triggers API call and reflects filter in URL @plp @filter @positive

steps.title: Step 1: Navigate to lipstick search and wait for PLP to load
Step 2: Wait for filter panel (drawer trigger) to be visible
Step 3: Open filter drawer and apply first available filter option
Step 4: Wait for filtered results API response (or redirect abort)
Assert: URL reflects active filter (URL changed from baseline)

specs.title: FTC_02_01_02 -- Applying multiple filters on lipstick search narrows results @plp @filter @positive

steps.title: Navigate to lipstick PLP
Wait for filter drawer trigger to be visible
Open filter drawer and apply first filter
Assert URL changed after first filter applied
Open filter drawer again and apply a second filter

specs.title: FTC_02_01_03 -- Filter panel is present on lipstick PLP and page loads without error @plp @filter @negative

steps.title: Navigate to lipstick PLP
Assert filter trigger (drawer button) is present
Assert page loaded without a JavaScript error heading

specs.title: FTC_02_01_04 -- Removing applied filter on lipstick PLP restores full results and clears filter URL param @plp @filter @negative

steps.title: Navigate to lipstick PLP and apply first filter
Open filter drawer and uncheck the applied filter
Assert: URL no longer contains the filter parameter after clearing

specs.title: TC-83234 FTC_02_02_01 -- Selecting 'Price: Low to High' sort on vitamins search triggers API call and reflects sort in URL @plp @sort @positive

steps.title: Step 1: Navigate to vitamins search and wait for PLP to load
Step 2: Wait for sort control to be visible
Step 3: Open sort overlay and select 'Price: Low to High' option
Step 4: Wait for sorted results API response / URL update
Assert: URL reflects active sort (URL changed from baseline)

specs.title: FTC_02_02_02 -- Sort control is present on vitamins PLP and page loads without error @plp @sort @negative

steps.title: Navigate to vitamins PLP
Assert sort button (overlay trigger) is visible
Assert page loaded without a JavaScript error heading

specs.title: FTC_02_02_03 -- Switching sort from 'Price: Low to High' to 'Price: High to Low' updates URL @plp @sort @boundary

steps.title: Navigate to vitamins PLP
Wait for sort control to be visible
Apply 'Price: Low to High' sort first
Switch to 'Price: High to Low' sort
Assert URL updated after sort switch

steps.title: Navigate to vitamins PLP
Assert sort button (overlay trigger) is visible
Assert page loaded without a JavaScript error heading

specs.title: FTC_02_02_03 -- Switching sort from 'Price: Low to High' to 'Price: High to Low' updates URL @plp @sort @boundary

steps.title: Navigate to vitamins PLP
Wait for sort control to be visible
Apply 'Price: Low to High' sort first
Switch to 'Price: High to Low' sort
Assert URL updated after sort switch
